info.title: BlogBowl API
info.description: REST API for managing blog pages, posts, authors, newsletters, and subscribers.

get.summary: List all authors for the workspace

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Filter by active flag (defaults to true)

get.summary: List all categories for a page
List all emails for a newsletter

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (draft, scheduled, sent, failed)

scheduled_at.description: Schedule for future (ISO 8601 format). Omit to send immediately.

post.summary: Upload an image and return its URL

get.summary: List all newsletters for the workspace
List all pages for the workspace
List all posts for a page
List all subscribers for a newsletter
